reading.title: Reading: Jobs in my family
reading.passage: My father is a doctor. He works at a hospital and helps many patients every day. My mother is a nurse. She takes care of patients and gives them medicine. My uncle is a farmer who grows rice and vegetables.

questions.question: The father is a nurse.
questions.explanation: Bố là bác sĩ ("doctor"), không phải nurse.

reading.title: Reading: What do they do?
reading.passage: I am a programmer. I write computer code. My sister is an architect. She designs buildings. My father is a pilot, and my mother is a journalist. My friend is a scientist who does research.
